page: Microsoft Azure D8lds_v7 is a compute-optimized virtual machine from the Dldsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor operating at a base frequency of 4.2 GHz. The system is configured with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a low memory-to-vCPU ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It includes 472 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage.

The x86_64 architecture processor is equipped with a substantial 480 MB L3 cache, 2 MB L2 cache, and 48 KB L1d cache. It supports advanced instruction sets including Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX, AVX512), Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX_TILE, AMX_INT8) for accelerated matrix operations, and cryptographic acceleration via AES, VAES, and SHA_NI.

Benchmark data indicates strong single-core performance, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance placing in the top 25% and single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression reaching the top 10%. Multi-core stress-ng performance, PassMark CPU scores, and memory bandwidth read/write operations fall within the average range. LLM inference text generation using a small 135M model is strong, while medium 7B model processing remains average.

Given its low memory-to-vCPU ratio, the D8lds_v7 offers a cost-efficient profile for compute-heavy workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. The inclusion of 472 GB of local storage provides high-speed workspace, though the lack of a GPU limits its utility for heavy deep learning training. This instance is well-suited for single-threaded tasks, web serving, lightweight containerized applications, and compute-bound batch processing.
description: The Microsoft Azure D8lds_v7 is an x86_64 compute-optimized virtual machine powered by an 8-vCPU Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor running at 4.2 GHz. Built on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, it features 16.0 GB of system memory (2.0 GB per core) and 472 GB of local storage. The processor includes a large 480 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and Intel AMX. Benchmarks show top-tier single-threaded compression performance and strong single-core CPU execution, while multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics remain average. Lacking a GPU, this instance is designed for compute-intensive workloads with low memory requirements. It is highly suited for web serving, single-threaded processing, and lightweight machine learning inference.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D8lds_v7 is an 8-vCPU compute-optimized virtual machine featuring an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor, 16 GB of RAM, and 472 GB of local storage, designed for low-memory, high-compute workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D8lds_v7 is an 8-vCPU compute-optimized virtual machine with an Intel Xeon processor, 16 GB of RAM, and 472 GB of local storage.
tagline: A compute-optimized virtual machine featuring high-frequency Intel Xeon processing, advanced matrix extensions, and local storage for memory-lean workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor at 4.2 GHz
16.0 GB of system memory and 472 GB of local storage
Intel AMX and AVX-512 instruction support for accelerated matrix math
Top-tier single-threaded compression and strong single-core performance
Optimized for web serving, batch processing, and lightweight inference
